leadText: The Swift Mochi (Japanese: しゅんぱつのもち Instant Mochi) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX. It is a type of mochi that increases the EVs of one of a Pokémon's stats.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's Speed EVs by 10.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Speed stat.
